itemReviewed.name: Vidhya Niketan Public School - Vadavalli-Thondamuthur Rd

address.streetAddress: 21, 17, Puliakulam Rd, opp. Kidney Center, Puliakulam, Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu 641045

itemListElement.reviewBody: Worst experience in Admission process. We got a call (don't know on what basis they called) for entrance exam. only kids were allowed in the campus, parents were waiting outside the gate. Not even allowed to wait inside the campus for 2 hours. I didn't receive a call from the school, when I call them they said my kid was not selected. When I ask my kid he said that the supervising staff was not helped when he asked the doubts and she asked to leave that section. I wanted to inform this to the next level, but the receptionist said that they will not allow to speak further. Worst school. Don't go behind them.

itemReviewed.name: Vidhya Niketan Public School - Vadavalli-Thondamuthur Rd

itemListElement.reviewBody: Very bad experience. Had been there for my son's LKG admission. They gave a small enquiry form and said will call you once we select your form. After a week I called back.They said will call you .I don't know on What basis or criteria they choose the students,. Without even seeing our kid and not any interview process how could they not even consider our form. I think so they are giving importance only to money and still I don't understand why I don't get a call back from them.

itemReviewed.name: Vidhya Niketan Public School - Vadavalli-Thondamuthur Rd

itemListElement.reviewBody:
Thank god we didn’t receive a call from the school,

We visited many top schools in this zone to provide good education to our kids. So we listed 5 schools and this is the nearest school from our location. So we first went to this school but came back with no satisfaction of hearing about their money motive and no proper extra curriculum other than education. And their selection process is worst because we went in November for the next year  LKG admission but they not even considered the parents but showing so much attitude. If you want your kid to be excel both in academics and extra curriculum please don’t join your kid here.

itemReviewed.name: Vidhya Niketan Public School - Vadavalli-Thondamuthur Rd

itemListElement.reviewBody:
Teaching is good.
The problem is fees has increased tremendously.   Need at least a lakh rupees even for kindergarten including books.  School infra or sports or other amenities to help overall development of kids definitely is no match for the fees charged.   Asking to bring cash for certain fees like switchover, donation, books, etc.. if you are not worried about money and want your kid be only studious without much other activities or options, then go for this school.

itemReviewed.name: Vidhya Niketan Public School - Vadavalli-Thondamuthur Rd

itemListElement.reviewBody: Very happy with the school system and with the cooperative attitude of the teachers for making my child more confident to participate in theatrical activities

itemReviewed.name: Vidhya Niketan Public School - Vadavalli-Thondamuthur Rd

itemListElement.reviewBody: Happy to be associated with the school for this many years for both my kids..the best thing is -  not only the kids - even we parents are also very comfortable with the school,the teachers,management,their sense of responsibility and security...kudos and cheers for the binded efforts...one thing I wonder is..even Mr.heera bhai is a fantastic  personality who takes real care the kids just trying to step out of the gate..having such personalities at the campus is truly an asset..every teacher takes heights of responsibility for the safety and security of the kids too..when in class and out of campus too..that way we can forget the kids the moment they step into school..correspondent madams policy instilling discipline and self respect inside kids is highly commendable..she actually syncs with both the girl and boy parents mindset before taking any decisions..highly appreciable..very happy to be associated with the school

itemReviewed.name: Vidhya Niketan Public School - Vadavalli-Thondamuthur Rd

itemListElement.reviewBody:
It was a awesome trip and my daughter enjoyed a lot and the update on what's app was superb  idea it felt like parents are also  along on the trip  and the teachers were awesome and take care of students very well
Hope so u arrange another tour like this but this time a big one  and I would like to request evry parents to send their kids on trip because school days trip is always a memorable one n life time experience

itemReviewed.name: Vidhya Niketan Public School - Vadavalli-Thondamuthur Rd

itemListElement.reviewBody:
Great experience for the children. Well planned and executed. Parents were also updated regularly. We thank the teachers for the care and liberty given to the students. It is a memorable trip for the students.
Thank you

itemReviewed.name: Vidhya Niketan Public School - Vadavalli-Thondamuthur Rd

itemListElement.reviewBody: Great experience !good care by teachers ,arrangement for food, hotel , group photo's at all places and correct information to children about historic places last but not the least for whole  two days the children were without mobile that was the epic of the whole tour THANK U ONE AND ALL

itemReviewed.name: Vidhya Niketan Public School - Vadavalli-Thondamuthur Rd

itemListElement.reviewBody:
The trip was really good and it gave my kid
an amazing experience. He had a great trip with his friends as well as gained a lot of knowledge about historical sites and the different types of architecture there. Thanks to the teachers for the regular updates and the care they offered to my kid, and thanks to the school management for such an amazing trip.
